mapper.select: SELECT id FROM users WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, nickname, email, phone, family_id, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{familyId}, #{isActive}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, family_id = #{familyId}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
